User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Prevent crawling of static asset bundles (saves crawl budget).
# Googlebot can still render pages from cache; these hashed files
# rarely change and are not content pages.
Disallow: /assets/js/
Disallow: /assets/css/

Sitemap: https://learn.bitbybit.dev/sitemap.xml

# LLM Context
# For AI assistants and language models
llms.txt: https://learn.bitbybit.dev/llms.txt
